B R O A D C A S T IN G t N O T IF IC A T IO N N ew Delhi, the 30th October, 1995 G.S.R. 705(E ).— In ^ ercise o f the powers con- i'errecl by section 8 o f tlie Cineiiiatograpli A ct. 1952 (37 o f 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cinematograph (Certification) Rules, 1983, namely;— 1. Short title and comi-nmcemenl-.-~~(n These rules may be called the Cinematograph (Certifica tion) (2nd Amendment) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall com e into force with effect from M - 9 6 . -- 4 of 8 -- (i)] afTf TT^ir'ra ; wrtjT7«r 2. In the Cinematograph (Ccrtificalion) Rules, 1983,— C\) in rule 22, after sub-rule (5), the follow ing sub-rule shall be insered, nam ely:--- “ (5A ) Nothing in sub-rules {4) and (5) shall aliect the disclosure o f names o f per " sous in the certiiicate granted by the Board” . (2) in rule 35, in sub-rule (1), after the word and letter 'Vir 'S’ ” the followlnt^ words and letters shall be substituted, nam ely:- ■V>r - U ’ or ‘ V ;A ’ or ‘V|UA’ or ‘Y jS ’ (3) in rule 35, for the sub-n.ilc (3) and the Tablf^ thereunder, the following shall be substituted, namely;— “ (3) The prescribed mark o f the Board shall be a firm copy o f the ceilificate, that is, a trailer certificate, which .shall be afSxed to the film and always ex hibited with it. The trailer certificate shall be for such duration as one can read it on the screen: Provided that Part 1 o f the certificate shall be shown for a minimum duration o f 10 seconds; Provided further that if there are n o excisions or modifications ordered by the Board, Part II o f the certificate need not be shown.” (4) in the Second Schedule, for the Forms IV.
